source: held-out test (count-banana-plants, aerial UAV, per-plant labels)
eval_method: raw detector, imgsz=1024, conf=0.25, NMS iou=0.7, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
note: Real improvement in per-object detection: fewer false positives (precision 0.82 -> 0.90) and fewer misses (recall 0.80 -> 0.85) vs v3, from real-crop copy-paste augmentation + label cleanup. Single farm/region; count operating point should be recalibrated per farm (real_data/calibrate_count.py).
